name: bactopia-py
description: Python CLI tools for working with Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-citations
commands.description: Print out tools and citations used throughout Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-datasets
commands.description: Download optional datasets to supplement analyses

commands.name: bactopia-prepare
commands.description: Create a file of filenames (FOFN) of samples for Bactopia

commands.name: bactopia-search
commands.description: Query ENA and SRA for public accessions to process

commands.name: bactopia-summary
commands.description: Generate summary table with quality rankings from results

commands.name: bactopia-update
commands.description: Check for newer versions of modules used by Bactopia Tools

commands.name: bactopia-workflows
commands.description: List available Bactopia workflows and output paths

commands.name: bactopia-merge-schemas
commands.description: Merge Nextflow schemas for Bactopia workflows

commands.name: bactopia-atb-formatter
commands.description: Restructure AllTheBacteria assemblies for Bactopia Tools

commands.name: bactopia-pubmlst-setup
commands.description: One-time setup for PubMLST REST API credentials

commands.name: bactopia-pubmlst-build
commands.description: Build PubMLST MLST databases for Bactopia
